bloom_levels.remember: Requires only recalling explicit facts from text
bloom_levels.understand: Requires explaining, interpreting or summarizing concepts
bloom_levels.apply: Requires using knowledge in new or different situation
bloom_levels.analyze: Requires identifying relationships, patterns or connections between ideas
bloom_levels.evaluate: Requires making judgments, evaluating decisions or justifying choices
bloom_levels.create: Requires proposing solutions, elaborating ideas or creating something new
